acquisition method: Data were collected using data dependent acquisition.
collision energy: fragmented using high-energy collision induced dissociation with 35% normalized collision energy.
enrichment method: immunopurification of crosslinked peptides by binding to anti-isopeptide antibody 81D1C2
fragmentation method: fragmented using high-energy collision induced dissociation
instrument: Thermo Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
